steps.title: Link preposition to object
steps.content: The blank comes between the preposition by and its object, Native Hawaiians. In the phrase embodied by Native Hawaiians, the object completes the prepositional phrase, so punctuation should not interrupt that connection.

steps.title: Remove punctuation after by
steps.content: Choice A inserts a semicolon, Choice B inserts a colon, and Choice C inserts a comma. Each mark separates a preposition from its object and makes the phrase ungrammatical. The answer is D.
